'''鈭歾h-h-h-b''' ('''kazhaheboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:loike|loike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-h-h-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loike|loike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-h-h-b
|-
! Lemma
| kazhaheboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhaheboko|thizhaheboko]] || [[word:jizhaheboko|jizhaheboko]] || [[word:shizhaheboko|shizhaheboko]] || [[word:kizhaheboko|kizhaheboko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhaheboko|thozhaheboko]] || [[word:jozhaheboko|jozhaheboko]] || [[word:shozhaheboko|shozhaheboko]] || [[word:kozhaheboko|kozhaheboko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
